---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / 要解决的问题

Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it.
<!-- e.g. "I'm frustrated when I can't filter todos by tag across all projects" -->

## Proposed Solution / 建议方案

Describe what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Alternatives Considered / 考虑过的替代方案

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context / 附加信息

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
